temperature.evidence: Main to verbal cheez ko itna time bhi nahi dunga, mujhe time rahega toh main usko bhej dunga, samajh lunga.

objections.quote: Aap WhatsApp, ye cheez nahi hai, mera WhatsApp hai, usme detail bhej do, main usko pehle read kar lunga, uske baad dekhunga.

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: Toh ek baar main aapko saal ka 1 lakh ke according agar jo plan suggest karu... Toh kya ye saal ka 1 lakh saving karna comfortable rahega... Haan ji.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Isse pehle toh aapne investment kari hogi, like LIC wagera chal raha hoga sir? Hmm.

primary_goal.evidence: HDFC Life ka plan hai Sanchay Par Advantage. Proper traditional plan hai, guaranteed plan hai.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Main usko pehle read kar lunga, uske baad dekhunga.

agent_promises: 35% cash bonus on first annual premium for whole life

missed_opportunities: Did not ask about existing life insurance coverage amount or specific financial goals beyond general investment.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is open to reviewing information via WhatsApp but explicitly rejected verbal-only sales pressure.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced an HDFC Life plan with a 35% cash bonus promise, to which the customer responded with neutral acknowledgment.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was passive initially but became firm and assertive when the agent insisted on a verbal pitch instead of sending information.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer firmly rejected the verbal pitch, demanding written details to study first.
call_narrative.ending: The agent agreed to send details via WhatsApp and scheduled a follow-up call for 7:00 PM.

key_quotes: Aap WhatsApp, ye cheez nahi hai, mera WhatsApp hai, usme detail bhej do, main usko pehle read kar lunga, uske baad dekhunga.
Main to verbal cheez ko itna time bhi nahi dunga.
